blended.narrative: Holiday Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 64°F.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
